zh.lifeSummary: 當Alinora D'Aubigny於1300年出生在英國林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比時，她的父親Sir Helias De Aubeney39歲，母親Joan de Guernsey33歲。她和Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她於1361年住在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。她去世於1361年在英國薩默塞特享年61歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alinora D'Aubigny于1300年出生在英国林可爾史爾素斯 英格萊比时，她的父亲Sir Helias De Aubeney39岁，母亲Joan de Guernsey33岁。她和Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她于1361年住在英国英格兰薩默塞特。她去世于1361年在英国薩默塞特享年61岁，埋葬在英国。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alinora D'Aubigny was born in 1300, in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Sir Helias De Aubeney, was 39 and her mother, Joan de Guernsey, was 33. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. She lived in Somerset, England, United Kingdom in 1361. She died in 1361, in Somerset, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alinora D'Aubigny est née en 1300, à South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Helias De Aubeney, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Joan de Guernsey, avait 33 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. Elle a vécu à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1361. Elle est décédée en 1361, à Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alinora D'Aubigny 1300 in South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Helias De Aubeney 39 und ihre Mutter Joan de Guernsey 33. Sie hatte mit Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1361 hat sie in Somerset, England, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb 1361 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Somerset, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alinora D'Aubigny è nata il nel 1300 nel South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Sir Helias De Aubeney, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Joan de Guernsey, aveva 33 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. Vissuto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1361. Morì nel 1361, nel Somerset, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alinora D'Aubignyが1300年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアソウス イングレビーで生まれた時，父Sir Helias De Aubeneyは39歳，母Joan de Guernseyは33歳であった。彼女はSir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbrokeとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1361年にはイギリスイギリスソメルセトに住んでいた。彼女は1361年にイギリスソメルセトで61歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alinora D'Aubigny(이)가 1300년 영국 링코실르 소우스 잉글레비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Helias De Aubeney(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Guernsey(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1361년도에 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 살았다. 그녀는 1361년 영국 서머세트에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Holbroke, Somerset, England: Bro an Hañv, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alinora D'Aubigny nasceu em 1300, em South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Guernsey, tinha 33 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. Ela viveu em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1361. Ela faleceu em 1361, em Somerset, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alinora D'Aubigny родилась в 1300 г. в местности соут инглеби, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Helias De Aubeney было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Guernsey, 33. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. Она жила в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в 1361 году. Она умерла в 1361 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alinora D'Aubigny nació en 1300, en South Ingleby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Helias De Aubeney, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Joan de Guernsey, tenía 33 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Sir Reginald Hussey I, Earl of Holbroke. Vivió en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1361. Murió en 1361, en Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
